data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"fed2-b1ce","generatedAt":"2026-04-08T04:09:42Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Shared artifact impact analysis: consumer discovery in brainstorm scrutiny pipeline","description":"When brainstorm creates an epic that modifies shared artifacts (standards, contracts, configs consumed by multiple agents/modules), the scrutiny pipeline does not discover all consumers. The gap analysis runs in the same context window as the understanding loop, creating frame-bias. This allowed epic 8df3-61d0 to ship with 4 agents covered when 7+ participate in the test quality lifecycle.","successCriteria":["The scrutiny pipeline gap analysis includes Part C (shared artifact impact analysis): scans the codebase for all files referencing artifact(s) being created/modified, cross-references against SCs, flags uncovered consumers. Output format: list of (file_path, matching_line, covered_by_SC: true|false) tuples presented to the user","Part C triggers when any SC or Approach section references creating or modifying a file that is referenced by 2+ other files outside its own directory \u2014 detected by a codebase scan at trigger time. Trigger is tech-stack-agnostic","The Scope fidelity reviewer gains a consumer_completeness dimension \u2014 a new dimension on the EXISTING Scope reviewer sub-agent, evaluated using raw Part C scan output","consumer_completeness has the same pass threshold (>=4) as all other fidelity dimensions \u2014 a low score blocks the epic","Smoke test: running brainstorm on an epic with the same description as closed epic 8df3-61d0, Part C enumerates 7+ files referencing behavioral-testing-standard.md and the fidelity reviewer flags any not covered by SCs"]},"stories":[{"id":"bf7b-4ed1","title":"As a brainstorm agent, I can scan the codebase for all consumers of shared artifacts referenced in an epic's success criteria","description":"Add Part C (shared artifact impact analysis) to the scrutiny pipeline gap analysis step. Part C scans the codebase for all files referencing artifact(s) being created or modified by the epic, cross-references the discovered consumers against the epic success criteria, and flags uncovered consumers.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, Part C of the gap analysis scans the codebase for all files referencing artifact(s) being created or modified by the epic, and presents a list of (file_path, matching_line, covered_by_SC: true/false) tuples","When this story is complete, Part C triggers only when any SC or Approach section references creating or modifying a file that is referenced by 2+ other files outside its own directory, detected by a tech-stack-agnostic codebase scan at trigger time","When this story is complete, Part C passes raw scan output (file paths and matching context) to downstream consumers, not agent-curated summaries","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] Codebase scanning logic should use mock-compatible interfaces for unit tests","[Reliability] Grep/ast-grep scan may produce large output for popular artifacts \u2014 consider truncation strategy","[Performance] Codebase scan on large repos could be slow \u2014 consider timeout budget","[Maintainability] Part C output format is consumed by both gap analysis presentation and fidelity reviewer \u2014 establish a clear contract"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"The scrutiny pipeline gap analysis includes Part C (shared artifact impact analysis)"},{"id":"328f-90eb","title":"As a brainstorm agent, I can evaluate whether an epic's success criteria cover all consumers of its shared artifacts","description":"Add a consumer_completeness dimension to the existing Scope fidelity reviewer sub-agent in the scrutiny pipeline.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, the Scope fidelity reviewer evaluates a consumer_completeness dimension using raw Part C scan output","When this story is complete, a low consumer_completeness score (below 4) blocks the epic from passing fidelity review","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] consumer_completeness dimension must receive the same raw tuple format produced by Part C","[Reliability] Large consumer lists may challenge sub-agent context limits"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bf7b-4ed1"],"satisfiesCriterion":"The Scope fidelity reviewer gains a consumer_completeness dimension"},{"id":"e644-9a50","title":"As a developer, I can verify consumer discovery works end-to-end using 8df3-61d0 as a smoke test","description":"Create a smoke test that runs the brainstorm scrutiny pipeline on an epic with the same description as closed epic 8df3-61d0 and verifies Part C enumerates 7+ files and fidelity reviewer flags uncovered consumers.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, running the smoke test with 8df3-61d0 description as input causes Part C to enumerate 7+ files referencing behavioral-testing-standard.md and the fidelity reviewer flags any not covered by SCs","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] The smoke test should mock the sub-agent dispatch for the fidelity reviewer while exercising real Part C scan logic","[Reliability] The exact count of files may change \u2014 assert >= 7 rather than an exact count"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bf7b-4ed1","328f-90eb"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Smoke test with 8df3-61d0 description as input"},{"id":"8e7b-7396","title":"Update project docs to reflect shared artifact impact analysis in scrutiny pipeline","description":"Update existing project documentation to reflect Part C and consumer_completeness dimension.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md and existing scrutiny pipeline documentation accurately describe Part C and the consumer_completeness fidelity dimension"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bf7b-4ed1","328f-90eb","e644-9a50"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation completeness for the epic"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["bf7b-4ed1","328f-90eb","e644-9a50","8e7b-7396"]}}
